title: French Salmon Terrine
description: A classic French terrine recipe made with salmon and savory flavors. Perfect for a special occasion dinner.
instructions: Season the pork belly with salt and black pepper.
In a large pan, sear the pork belly until browned on all sides.
In a separate pan, sauté the onion until softened.
Add the chopped thyme and bay leaves to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
In a large terrine dish, layer the pork belly, salmon fillets, and onion mixture.
Drizzle the butter over the top and cover with foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for 10-15 minutes.
Let the terrine rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
